summary: Full-stack testing completed for Investment Portfolio app. 14/14 backend pytest tests passed (portfolio, products with all category filters, questionnaire scoring across all 3 buckets, real Claude Sonnet 4.5 SSE streaming, chat history persistence). 32/32 frontend Playwright checks passed (dashboard stat cards + 7 holdings + charts, objectives wizard incl. gating/back/restart with Long-term result, products tabs + search + watchlist toast, AI agent panel with real streamed response 'Hi there! I\'m Aria...'). Real AI provider verified end-to-end via both backend and frontend paths.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer emits console warning 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial mount; visually the donut can appear compressed on first paint. Non-blocking but recommend setting minWidth/minHeight or aspect on the container div wrapping ResponsiveContainer.

action_items: (Optional polish) Fix Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warning by giving the chart wrappers a fixed min-height or removing 100%/100% on ResponsiveContainer when the parent hasn't laid out yet.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /questionnaire/submit accepts empty answers list without validation — could insert a 0-score doc; consider requiring len(answers)==5.

chat_stream persists a chat_messages row even if the stream errored out early (full_text may be empty at time of insert_many if StreamDone was reached first without any TextDelta) — currently only errors return early, so acceptable, but a safeguard `if full_text:` before insert would be safer.
AIAgent.jsx: fetch to /chat/stream has no res.ok / status check before reading body — a 500 would still try to parse an empty body silently.
recharts ResponsiveContainer inside a flex column emits width/height(-1) warnings on first mount; add explicit min-height to parent.
seed_data_creation: None - backend uses in-memory static data; questionnaire submissions and chat messages are persisted to Mongo per test (prefixed TEST_ session ids for chat).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and load REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Chat streaming test uses real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and Claude Sonnet 4.5 — expect ~5-10s. All data-testids used: dashboard-page, stat-networth/-invested/-gain/-day-change, performance-chart-card, allocation-chart-card, holdings-table-card, holding-row-{TICKER}, nav-dashboard/-objectives/-products, objectives-page, objectives-result-page, question-text, option-{qid}-{value}, next-btn, prev-btn, result-horizon, alloc-{Category}, restart-questionnaire-btn, products-page, category-tab-{slug}, products-search, product-card-{TICKER}, invest-btn-{TICKER}, ai-agent-toggle, ai-agent-panel, ai-agent-input, ai-agent-send, ai-agent-messages, mic-btn, voice-toggle-btn, ai-agent-close.
rca of the issue: No functional bugs found — MVP is fully working.
